parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_buffer.posts (id, text, channel_id, due_at, status, assets, metrics, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}',
  {{ $json.due_at ? "'" + $json.due_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.assets) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metrics) }}'::jsonb,
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  text = EXCLUDED.text,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  due_at = EXCLUDED.due_at,
  assets = EXCLUDED.assets,
  metrics = EXCLUDED.metrics,
  updated_at = NOW();

=INSERT INTO s_buffer.channels (id, name, service, organization_id, active)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.service }}', '{{ $json.organization_id }}', true)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, service = EXCLUDED.service, organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, updated_at = NOW();

=UPDATE s_buffer.posts
SET
  reactions = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'reactions'), 0),
  comments = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'comments'), 0),
  shares = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'shares'), 0),
  reposts = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'reposts'), 0),
  clicks = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'clicks'), 0),
  reach = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'reach'), 0),
  impressions = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'impressions'), 0),
  views = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::integer FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'views'), 0),
  engagement_rate = COALESCE((SELECT (m->>'value')::numeric FROM jsonb_array_elements(metrics) m WHERE m->>'type' = 'engagementRate'), 0.00)
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}';
